leadText: This article is about the move in the core games. For the Skill Swapper enhancement in Pokémon Shuffle, see List of items in Pokémon Shuffle → Enhancements. Skill Swap (Japanese: スキルスワップ Skill Swap) is a non-damaging Psychic-type move introduced in Generation III. It is: TM48 in Generation III, Generation IV, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TR40 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM098 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.
